patch.value: S2: move the --audit linked-usage report mode off pm files/pm docs into pm-governance-audit

Remove the --audit option from the core pm files and pm docs registrations (src/cli/register-mutation.ts ~3163 and ~3221) and carve the cross-item linked-path usage-report branch out of runFilesAction/runDocsAction into the package, per the D1 mechanism chosen on pm-fg0b (registerFlags + registerCommand override vs package-owned report command). Also remove the two --audit entries from sdk/cli-contracts/flag-contracts.ts (~352/~368) and the audit wording from the pm_files MCP tool description (src/mcp/tool-definitions.ts:392) — coordinate with S4 which owns the systematic contract purge. --validate-paths and all other files/docs modes stay core. Blocked by the D1 decision.

bare-core pm files --audit / pm docs --audit fail as unknown option with capability-aware hint (mind pm-qljv class: hint must not recommend a command the user cannot run); with package installed the audit report mode works identically to today; flag-contracts --audit entries and pm_files MCP description audit wording removed from core
